sections.title: Talking to Larxus after being challenged by Leon d'Cour

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Leon d'Cour has issued you a challenge. He has stated there will be no items allowed except those you're wearing. Do you want to accept the challenge?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Your challenger is ready! Please go down through the trapdoor when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll pass.

sections.title: Talking to Larxus after defeating Leon d'Cour

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Welcome back, champion! Leon d'Cour has granted you his cloak for you to wear as a sign of your accomplishment. Do you want it now? Or do you want something else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have space to take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like another one.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have space to take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, and goodbye.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Is there something I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was given a challenge, what now?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Hand it to me, and we'll get you started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: This is the champions' arena. The champions of various races use it to duel those they deem worthy of the honour. If you find a challenge scroll in your travels, bring it here to face your challenger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: No, you've not earned any.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Have a look in the chest by the Wall of Defeated Champions, on the north side of this gallery. I think you'll find something in there for you.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: You're holding it already. Go and rub your lamp.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: I don't think I've got anything more for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing thanks.

sections.title: Attempting to teleport out of the room

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: There's a ladder for a reason.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Special Attacks. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: Your challenger is ready! Please go down through the trapdoor when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Magic attacks, no Melee or Ranged. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Ranged attacks, no Melee or Magic. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Magic attacks. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to use Melee attacks, no Ranged or Magic. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Melee attacks. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're only allowed to take Weapons, no other items are allowed. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Prayers. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed to use any Ranged attacks. Do you still want to proceed?

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: So you want to accept the challenge huh? Well there are some specific rules for these Champion fights. For this fight you're not allowed any Weapons or Armour. Do you still want to proceed?

sections.title: Attempting to give him a scroll after accepting a challenge

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: You've already got a champion waiting for you.

sections.title: Attempting to give him a scroll for a defeated champion

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: You've already defeated this Champion. The challenge is void.

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: That's great, now go show who's interested.

sections.title: Trying to climb down Champion statue without giving Larxus a champion scroll

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: You need to arrange a challenge with me before you enter the arena.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the fight with the ghoul champion with items other than a weapon

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: I believe I mentioned you're only allowed to take Weapons into this duel.

sections.title: Attempting to attack the skeleton champion with melee or magic

lines.speaker: Larxus
lines.text: I believe I mentioned you're only allowed to use Ranged in this duel.
